nasb.text: The young lions do lack and suffer hunger; But they who seek the Lord shall not be in want of any good thing.

esv.text: The young lions suffer want and hunger; but those who seek the Lord lack no good thing.

cnv.text: 少壯獅子有時還缺食挨餓， 但尋求耶和華的，甚麼好處都不缺。

ccb.text: 壮狮也会忍饥挨饿， 但寻求耶和华的人什么福分都不缺。

csbs.text: 少壮狮子也会疲乏、饥饿， 但寻求耶和华的什么福份都不缺。
